title: Executive Order 7969—Partial Revocation of Executive Order of February 19, 1920, Creating Power Site Reserve No. 730
text:
[Power Site Restoration No. 490]
OREGON
By virtue of and pursuant to the authority vested in me by the act of June 25, 1910, ch. 421, 36 Stat. 847, as amended by the act of August 24, 1912, ch. 369, 37 Stat. 497, the Executive order of February 19, 1920, creating Power Site Reserve No. 730, is hereby revoked as to the following-described lands:
WILLAMETTE MERIDIAN
T. 4 S., R. 5 E., sec. 19, lot 1.
FRANKLIN D ROOSEVELT
The White House,
September 10, 1938.
